subject: fix(audit): implement all code review findings — bugs, a11y, UX, quality
body:
Fix 3 high-priority bugs: Create/Save buttons with no onClick handler,
title editing not persisting to store, and api.ts crash on 204 responses.
Add focus trapping (WCAG 2.4.3) to all 3 dialogs, arrow key navigation
to RatingField, keyboard support for mobile submission cards.
Extract shared Spinner and StatusBadge components, consolidate duplicate
isFieldEmpty, optimize Zustand selectors, replace UI jargon with plain
language, and fix WCAG contrast on all interactive gray-300 elements.

Tags: audit, bugs, accessibility, ux, refactor, code-quality
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-audit
Semver: patch
